data.body: Ran plan-review on epic sure-foyer-aroma (ac1b) + all 14 children. RESULT: all 15 PASS, ZERO BLOCK. Operational note: cross-session rate contention (other bg sessions run review-plan sharing the Anthropic burst limit) caused 429->INDETERMINATE for ~6 children on the concurrent batch and again for A/G/H/D1/D4 on the sequential run; a retry-with-backoff repair pass recovered all to PASS (llm_ran=True). Then applied user-approved remediation of valid advisory findings (Tiers 1-3): set file_impact on all 13 leaves (incl. declaring criteria_routing.json on C/E/F so next_batch serializes those shared-file edits); rewrote 8 descriptions to fold in grounded prerequisites the plans had glossed: (A) eval harness has NO code-review arm in eval_solver.run_case + no code_review_* scorer in eval_scorers.py -> story A must extend the harness before writing specs; (C,E) new overlay ids deletion-impact/scope-intent must be added to the closed OVERLAY_IDS tuple in registry.py or dispatch silently drops them; (E) assemble.py doesn't read the rebar-ticket trailer + ticket_context is shared so ticket-blindness needs real plumbing; (F) engine_b.scan is whole-file+location-postfilter not added-lines-only -> reconcile granularity; softened the pink-elephant 'disproven' overclaim to 'not-supported at n=3, directional'; specified applies_when tag vocab (G), non-trivial-diff threshold (H); defined the epic's measurement baseline (story A records pre-change gate rates). CONSEQUENCE: these material edits invalidate the plan-review attestations for the claim gate on every edited ticket (manifest binds material:a4107ea...; only da8a D-story untouched/valid). Edited tickets need re-review before claim (claim gate enforces this lazily). Full plan-review outputs in ~/.claude/jobs/19885ca3/tmp/planrev/.
